pwa.update_ready: A new version of the app is available.
pwa.offline_ready: App is ready to work offline.
pwa.install_sub: Add to home screen for quick access

layout.impersonation_banner: Preview mode — session as organisation admin
layout.subscription_expired_msg: Plan expired — features are blocked. Renew your subscription.
layout.subscription_expiring_msg: Plan is expiring soon — check subscription details.

session.will_expire_in_minute: Session will expire in one minute

errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.sso_not_configured: Entra ID login is not configured for this domain.
errors.sso_check_failed: Unable to check SSO configuration. Check your connection.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.sso_managed_title: Account managed by Entra ID / Microsoft
changePassword.sso_managed_text: Your password is managed by Microsoft 365. To change it, go to
changePassword.intro: After changing your password you'll be signed out and asked to sign in again.

errors.min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.different: New password must be different from the current one.
errors.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

deskmap.stale_warning: Connection issue — data may be outdated
deskmap.no_desks_sub: Add desks in the administration panel.

empty.sub: An admin can add them in the management panel.

deskmap.no_plan_sub: Add a floor plan to view desks on the map.

dirty_guard.title: Unsaved changes
dirty_guard.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

errors.not_impersonation: Token is not an owner impersonation.

qr.occupied_desc: This desk is occupied by someone else. Choose another desk.
qr.login_prompt: Sign in to reserve or check in
qr.occupied_other_desc: This desk is already occupied by someone else. Choose another desk.

qr.title: QR — {{name}}
qr.print_hint: Print and place on the desk — users scan with their phone to check-in

actions.maintenance_blocked: Desk in service — reservation not available

confirm.delete_permanent: Permanently delete desk "{{name}}"? This operation is irreversible.

desks.deactivate_hint: Deactivates the desk — it can be permanently deleted later.

reserve.title: Reserve desk
reserve.open_hours: Open {{open}}–{{close}} · max {{maxHours}}h · up to {{maxDays}} days ahead
reserve.any_time: You can reserve a desk for any time of the day.

errors.end_after_start: End time must be after the start time.
errors.max_days: Reservations can be made up to {{days}} days ahead.

modals.deactivate_text: The account will be deactivated. After the retention period personal data will be anonymized, but historical activity will remain.
modals.confirm_hard_delete: Permanently delete account "{{name}}"? Activity will be preserved.

invite.hint: An activation link will be sent to the provided email address. Valid for 7 days.
invite.sent_body: An activation link has been sent to {{email}}.

insights.select_location: Select a location to view insights
insights.select_location_hint: Choose an office to generate AI occupancy insights

snapshot.hint: Live data (current state) — independent of the selected date range

utilization.title: Desk utilization
utilization.hint: Percentage of working days ({{workdays}}) with at least 1 reservation

reports.no_data: No data for the selected period

organizations.subtitle: Physical offices — opening hours, addresses, locations
organizations.no_locations: No offices — add your first office
organizations.gateway_token_single_use: This is a one-time token — it expires after use. If installation fails, come back here and generate a new one.

form.limits_hint: Opening hours and limits define when and how long users can reserve desks. Walk-in via QR ends automatically at closing time.
form.country_hint: Used to exclude public holidays when calculating utilization working days
form.wifi_hint: WiFi credentials are encrypted and used when provisioning beacons
form.parking_hint: Whether parking spots are booked for specific hours or for the entire day.
form.led_brightness_hint: Applies to all states (FREE, RESERVED, OCCUPIED, GUEST, ERROR).
form.led_colors_hint: Colours sent to beacons via MQTT on save.

reservations.none_hint: Go to the desk map to create a reservation
reservations.none_filters_sub: Try changing the filters or date.

provisioning.title: Provisioning
provisioning.subtitle: Register and manage gateways and beacons

firmware.update_all_confirm:
Update {{count}} beacon(s) to v{{version}}?

Each beacon will restart (~30s). Do not power off devices during update.
firmware.update_all_started: Update queued for {{count}} beacon(s) to v{{version}}
firmware.no_outdated: All beacons are running the latest firmware.
firmware.no_releases: No firmware releases found. Publish a release on GitHub.

ota.started_desc: Beacon "{{hwId}}" is downloading firmware v{{version}}. Status will update automatically.
ota.failed_desc: Beacon "{{hwId}}" did not update within 10 minutes. Check device connectivity.
ota.conflict: Update already in progress. Please wait.
ota.no_desk: Beacon must be assigned to a desk before updating.

gateway.install_step1: Power on the Raspberry Pi (or any Linux device)
gateway.install_step3: Paste the command below and press Enter
gateway.offline_diag: Offline for {{count}} min — check: journalctl -u reserti-gateway -n 20
gateway.stale_diag: No heartbeat for {{count}} min — check: systemctl status reserti-gateway
gateway.secret_unreachable: Could not reach gateway — update manually before the window expires
gateway.confirm_update:
Update gateway "{{name}}" to the latest version?

The gateway will restart (~15s).
gateway.confirm_rotate:
Gateway key rotation

A new key will be generated and sent to the gateway automatically.
The old key remains valid for 15 minutes — a window for manual update if needed.
gateway.never_connected: Never connected — run the install command from the Office panel → + Gateway
gateway.token_single_use: This token is one-time only. It expires after use — come back for a new one if installation fails.
gateway.secret_updated: Gateway updated automatically — will restart in ~2s

device.delete_confirm: Delete beacon "{{hwId}}"? This cannot be undone.
device.no_beacons_sub: Use the PROVISION:{...} command in Serial Monitor to add a beacon.
device.no_gateways: No gateways — click "+ New gateway" to generate an installation command
device.provision_serial_hint: Paste the above via Serial Monitor (115200 baud) when the beacon is in provisioning mode.

provisioning.wifi_prefill_hint: WiFi credentials are pre-filled from the location settings. You can edit them.
provisioning.wifi_missing_hint: This location has no WiFi configured. Go to location settings and set the network credentials to complete the provisioning command.

notifications.inapp_active_desc: You receive notifications via the 🔔 bell in the panel. No setup required.
notifications.empty_desc: Important system alerts will appear here.

rules.title: System notification rules
rules.subtitle: Define who sees which notifications in the panel

notifications.reservation_user_note: Each user can enable/disable in their profile
notifications.recipients_sa_only: Recipients for infrastructure notifications are managed by the system administrator.
notifications.smtp_how_own: Emails are sent from your address (e.g. noreply@company.com). Staff see your company's email, not Reserti.
notifications.smtp_how_global: Emails sent by the Reserti system administrator. No configuration required.
notifications.smtp_how_secure: SMTP password is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage. It is never returned by the API.
notifications.test_email_hint: Send a test email to verify that the mail server is configured correctly.

announce.title: System announcement
announce.rules_how_body: Each rule defines which notification appears for users with a given role. Notifications are shared across all organizations — each organization only sees notifications related to its own infrastructure. System announcements are sent to all selected roles across all organizations.

editor.title: Floor Plan Editor
editor.hint: Drag desks onto the plan. R = rotate. Ctrl+Z = undo.
editor.no_desks_sub: Add desks before setting up the floor plan.

toolbar.file_too_large: File too large. Maximum size is 2MB.

unplaced.title: {{count}} desks without position
unplaced.hint: Click a desk to place it at the centre of the plan.

view.no_plan_sub: An admin can upload a floor plan in edit mode.

floorplan.discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

weekly.title: Team Attendance
weekly.subtitle: Who is and will be in the office — weekly view
weekly.click_to_filter: Click to filter by this day

resource.page_sub: Manage conference rooms, parking spots and equipment
resource.allday_free: Spot available for the whole day
resource.allday_taken: Spot is taken for this day
resource.allday_hint: Reservation covers the entire working day.
resource.empty_sub: Add conference rooms or parking spots.

amenities.title: Room amenities dictionary
amenities.description: Amenity tags available when creating conference rooms in your organization.

push.title: Reserti
push.subtitle: Desk booking notification
push.description: You have a new update regarding your reservation
push.banner_sub: Stay updated on reservations and IoT alerts
push.card_sub: Know instantly when something needs your attention
push.benefit2: Your reservation is ready for check-in
push.denied_hint: Push notifications blocked by browser. Unblock in site settings (🔒 → Notifications).
push.unsupported: This browser doesn't support push — use the 🔔 bell for notifications.
push.browser_desc: If enabled, you'll receive system pop-ups even when the app is in the background. The 🔔 bell notifications work independently of this option.

visitors.title: Office Visitors
visitors.subtitle: Manage visits and guests
visitors.empty_sub: Invite your first visitor using the button above.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Plan status and resource usage
subscription.expiry_banner: Your plan expires in {{days}} days ({{date}}). Contact your administrator.
subscription.expired_banner: Your plan expired {{date}}. New resources are blocked.

integrations.page_sub: Connect Reserti with external tools used by your organisation
integrations.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this integration? All configuration will be lost.

AZURE_ENTRA.name: Azure Entra ID
AZURE_ENTRA.description: Microsoft SSO — employees log in with their corporate Microsoft account

SLACK.name: Slack
SLACK.description: Slack channel notifications — reservations, check-ins, IoT alerts

GOOGLE_WORKSPACE.name: Google Workspace
GOOGLE_WORKSPACE.description: Google SSO — employees log in with their corporate Google account

MICROSOFT_TEAMS.name: Microsoft Teams
MICROSOFT_TEAMS.description: Teams channel notifications — reservations, check-ins, beacon alerts

WEBHOOK_CUSTOM.name: Custom Webhook
WEBHOOK_CUSTOM.description: Custom integrations — send HTTP events to any external system

azure.tenant_id_hint: Find it at: Azure Portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview → Tenant ID
azure.use_custom_app_hint: By default we use Reserti's global app registration. Choose this if your company requires its own App Registration.
azure.admin_consent_body: Your company's Entra ID Global Admin must accept the Reserti app. Open the link below as Global Admin and click Accept.
azure.sso_enabled_hint: 'Sign in with Microsoft' button will appear on the login page

slack.bot_token_hint: Get from: api.slack.com → Your app → OAuth & Permissions → Bot User OAuth Token
slack.signing_secret_hint: Get from: api.slack.com → Basic Information → App Credentials
slack.default_channel_hint: Channel name (with #) or channel ID. Bot must be invited to the channel.

google.allowed_domain_hint: Only accounts from this Google domain will be able to log in
google.setup_title: How to set up Google OAuth
google.setup_step1: Create a project in Google Cloud Console
google.setup_step3: Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (type: Web application)
google.setup_step5: Copy Client ID and Client Secret

teams.webhook_url_hint: Get from: Teams → channel → ⋯ → Connectors → Incoming Webhook → Configure
teams.setup_title: How to add Incoming Webhook in Teams
teams.setup_step1: Open the Teams channel where you want to receive notifications
teams.setup_step4: Give it a name (e.g. Reserti) → Create
teams.setup_step5: Copy the generated URL and paste it here

webhook.secret_hint: Use to verify the X-Reserti-Signature: sha256=<hmac> header

smtp.global_available: Emails are sent through Reserti's global mailbox. You can configure your own organisation mailbox — emails will appear to come from your company.
smtp.no_config: No SMTP configured — email notifications are inactive. Configure your own mailbox or ask the system administrator to set up global SMTP.
smtp.encrypted_hint: Password is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before being stored in the database.

insights.no_data: Not enough data to generate insights (min. 10 check-ins in the last 30 days).
insights.title: AI Insights (last 30 days)
insights.more: +{{count}} more insights in the Reports tab

calendar.title: Calendar sync
calendar.subtitle: Connect Outlook Calendar so reservations automatically appear in your calendar.
calendar.connect_success: Outlook Calendar connected. Reservations will now be synced.
calendar.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect Outlook Calendar? Reservations will stop syncing.
calendar.sync_info:
• New reservations automatically appear in Outlook Calendar
• Cancelled reservations remove the calendar event
• Time changes in Outlook are synced back to Reserti
calendar.no_azure_info: Requires: Microsoft 365 account in company domain + Azure integration configured by admin.
calendar.not_connected_hint: Not connected — click to sync with Outlook

register.error_no_token: No invitation token found in the URL.
register.error_invalid: This invitation does not exist or has expired.
register.error_expired: This invitation has expired. Please ask your admin to send a new one.
register.error_used: This invitation has already been used.
register.error_generic: Error creating account. Please try again.
register.error_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.success_body: You can now log in to Reserti.

my_bookings.empty: You have no upcoming room bookings
my_bookings.title: My room bookings
my_bookings.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this room booking?
